# anthropic_chat_projects_usage (Data Source)

Per-project chat usage (message counts + unique users) for the date range.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_chat_projects_usage" "last_week" {
  starting_date = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD", timeadd(timestamp(), "-168h"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ending_date` (String)
- `starting_date` (String)

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `message_count` (Number)
- `project_id` (String)
- `project_name` (String)
- `unique_users` (Number)
